overallAssessment: The agent specified 18 unsupported error-type names across the error_handling_strategies output. This validator reclassifies those 18 findings into groups by attestation level: Group A (directly named in source, ACCEPT with no finding), Group B (derivable from named source behavior, ACCEPT with LOW annotation), Group C (plausible but unattested infrastructure failure for the component, MEDIUM), Group D (generic cross-component failure unrelated to any named behavior, HIGH). Generic error types like 'api_service_unavailable' for in-process components and 'serialization_failure' without source SR evidence are the primary offenders. The grounding_validator found 18 MEDIUM unsupported_claim findings; this validator escalates the worst-group entries to HIGH and clears the derivable ones.
